message:
feat(api,nn): add complex tensor ops (real, imag, conj) and reformat

Add tensor_real, tensor_imag, and tensor_conj session methods for
extracting real/imaginary components and computing conjugates of
Complex64/Complex128 tensors. All three ops reject grad-tracked inputs
with TensorRequiresGradNonFloating and reject non-complex dtypes.

Includes comprehensive tests covering both complex widths, non-complex
rejection, and grad-tracking rejection. Remaining changes are rustfmt
reformats in ft-api (cov, corrcoef, mode, tile, quantile tests) and
ft-nn (LPPool2d index calc, loss assertion).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
